name: Filibuster Firebrand
text:
Filibuster (As long as you keep talking out loud about anything at all, this creature has indestructible. If you stop, the effect ends.)
Whenever Filibuster Firebrand attacks, it deals 1 damage to each opponent for each word in this card's name. (That's two.)
flavorText: He has been recognized by the chair and refuses to be un-recognized.
